query: CRT television static screen flicker old TV monitor
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / analog_degradation: CRT television static and old TV monitors

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph of a flat-screen television mounted on a light-colored wall. The television's screen displays a dense, uniform pattern of black-and-white static noise. The set has a dark bezel, and a thin cable is visible running along the upper right corner of the frame, while the left edge of the television extends slightly past the image border.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white photograph of a flat-screen television exhibits analog degradation through a screen completely filled with monochromatic static snow, evoking a lost broadcast signal and aged analog media. The dark bezel and wall mounting accentuate the stark, gritty noise pattern dominating the display, creating a lo-fi, retro atmosphere of mechanical signal decay.
